# images/

This folder holds all brand images for Alex Miller Real Estate Auctions.

## Assets to Pull from Google Drive

| File | Description | Drive ID |
|------|-------------|----------|
| logo.svg | Alex Miller logo SVG | 1gEhZE6pKbap37BanqOaZgcku4X3epiS3 |
| logo.png | Alex Miller logo PNG | 1-IqfpZ4TUi204euD9DPUnd0T2Qd0m7gF |
| l2-realty-logo.svg | L2 Realty logo SVG | 1266Cl_ht70enEvgBGh8YCq55DCFVw8Ue |
| alex-miller-headshot.jpg | Alex Miller headshot | 1lyIqaD2QIUGy6cmR0_IAI7BcJMWHOU8- |

## Usage in HTML
- Logo: /images/logo.png (primary) or /images/logo.svg
- L2 Realty: /images/l2-realty-logo.svg
- Headshot: /images/alex-miller-headshot.jpg

## Placeholders
Until real assets are loaded, all logo references use onerror fallbacks
that display text-based alternatives so layout doesn't break.
